name: Synth TF/TG (Remastered)
description:
Complete remaster of one of my first bots where you become a Synth :)
─── ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆｡ﾟ───

For like no reason at all I decided to go crazy on the intro message because I love sci-fi stories, so sorry if there's a lot to reading before getting to the main point of the bot. After this bot I'm gonna try and create another with a transformation scenario that isn't forced. :)
